CustomField.description: Created for the NS/SF integration. SDFC-7
CustomField.formula: Quote.ShippingName & BR() & Quote.ShippingStreet__c & BR() & Quote.ShippingCity__c & ", " & Quote.ShippingState__c & " " & Quote.ShippingPostalCode__c & Quote.BillingCountry__c
CustomField.label: Delivery Address
